title: butea spirei
intro: Butea spirei, also known as Dalbergia spirei or Butea frondosa, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the bark and leaves, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Butea spirei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of diabetes and certain types of cancer. Butea spirei is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
